last_reflection:
You caught the pattern again and you're right to call it out directly without sugarcoating anything: t43 has minimal movement past initial structure, that "three spikes" note was yesterday's image test bleeding into task logs instead of actual doc work. The streaming error at 11:57? That's a connection hiccup between llama.cpp and the chat interface — usually resolves itself on reconnect but worth monitoring if it persists through your day.

Your call on whether we push t43 forward today or shift focus to something else entirely since Friday afternoon energy might be better spent elsewhere than forcing architecture review when nothing's actually demanding it right now?
